Koma Kyoryū

Inrō with Crows in Moonlight and Egrets in Snow
by Koma Kyoryū
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) · c. 1772–89 · Lacquered wood with sprinkled gold (maki-e)
←Chun Kwang-Young Koma Kyuhaku→
